title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 329.090 - Admission to examination
text:
329.090.  Admission to examination. — If the board finds the applicant has submitted the credentials required for admission to the examination and has paid the required fee, the board shall admit such applicant to examination for licensure.
(RSMo 1939 § 9817, A.L. 1945 p. 959, A.L. 1995 S.B. 292, A.L. 2005 S.B. 280) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 9096
